agents.name: Interviewer
agents.role: Extracts structured requirements; accepts Arabic or English input

agents.name: Architect
agents.role: Synthesizes requirements and debate into a copilot config

agents.name: Builder
agents.role: Instantiates the copilot from the config

agents.name: Validator
agents.role: Runs sample inputs through the new copilot and rejects if substandard

agents.name: Reviewer
agents.role: Reviews documents against the org-tuned stance

agents.name: Citation Verifier
agents.role: Validates every regulatory citation against the corpus via exact-text retrieval

agents.name: Counter-Proposal Drafter
agents.role: Drafts replacement clauses for flagged risks

agents.name: Synthesis
agents.role: Assembles final output with confidence scores and audit trail

findings.clause: The obligation of confidentiality shall survive termination of this Agreement for a period of three (3) years, save for trade secrets, which shall remain confidential indefinitely.

citation.exact_text:
Article (396)
Where parties to a commercial agreement have expressly agreed on duties of
confidentiality, such duties shall be construed in accordance with the express
terms of the agreement, supplemented by the general duties of good faith and
trade custom under this Law. In the absence of an express term, confidentiality
obligations relating to non-public commercial information shall survive
termination of the commercial relationship for a reasonable period.

findings.rationale: Three-year survival is below the five-year tail recommended by the org's tuned stance; trade-secret carve-out is acceptable.
findings.counter_proposal: Termination shall be exercised in good faith with not less than thirty (30) days' prior written notice for convenience, save for termination for cause for which the notice period shall be seven (7) days following a written cure period.

summary.recommendation: Acceptable subject to the listed counter-proposals.

details.clause: The obligation of confidentiality shall survive termination of this Agreement fo

audit_trail.reason: Draft is too generic; it does not anchor on the cited statute or quantify the remediation. Tighten with explicit obligations and reference the cited article.

details.clause: The obligation of confidentiality shall survive termination of this Agreement fo

audit_trail.reason: Draft anchors on the cited statute and resolves the flagged risk.
